creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
Herrie is a small command line interface music player. It is written in
C and uses curses for its interface. It also supports a variety of file
formats, using libvorbis, libmad and libsndfile.

Fix: 

A port is available at:

	http://g-rave.nl/junk/freebsd-ports-audio-herrie.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: n/a
